title: KASAFE 4 Blade Serrated Eccentric 4 Flute Drill Bits Set, Concrete Masonry Drill Bits for Brick, Tile, Wood & PVC, Fine-Polished Carbide Tips with 1/4" Hex Shank, Sizes 6/8/10/12mm
features: 【High-Strength Eccentric Twist Drill Bits】Meticulously engineered with industrial-grade carbide tips. This advanced manufacturing process endows them with remarkable properties, including exceptional hardness, toughness, outstanding wear resistance and remarkable impact resistance. The drill bits have been subject to a precise fine-polishing procedure and are designed with anti-rust capabilities, guaranteeing an extremely sharp drilling performance free of burrs. Regardless of whether you are engaged in drilling operations on concrete, glass, brick or wood substrates, these drill bits can consistently demonstrate long-term durability and high precision

【Quick and Efficient Drilling with Low Resistance】Specially devised for handheld drills, the high-strength eccentric twist drill bits offer precise positioning capabilities and are characterized by reduced friction. This feature substantially diminishes the probabilities of slippage or deflection throughout the drilling process, notably when operating on hard surfaces such as concrete, brick, and ceramic pots. Engineered with advanced technology, these bits are capable of achieving rapid drilling speeds while still upholding a high level of accuracy. Thus, they have become an essential component for any significant drilling project

【Versatile Drill Bit Set with Hex Shank Design】It is distinguished by its universal hex shank design, which not only provides a firm and secure grip but also exhibits excellent compatibility with a diverse array of drills. This enhanced versatility makes the set highly suitable for both professional contractors who demand precision in their work and DIY enthusiasts embarking on various home projects, as it ensures the appropriate tool is available for every task. The hex shank, in particular, plays a crucial role in enhancing holding power, effectively minimizing the potential for slippage during operation

【Multiple Materials】The drill bits exhibit remarkable adaptability and are suitable for an extensive array of materials. This encompasses glass, ceramics, tile, mirrors, flower pots, wood, porcelain, brick walls, marble, as well as thin metal sheets. When dealing with particularly hard substances such as ceramic tiles, concrete, masonry, marble, glass, and granite, it is recommended to use water to cool the drill bit. Additionally, a gradual application of pressure should be employed while initially maintaining a tilted angle that is then smoothly transitioned to vertical drilling. This approach not only ensures precision in hole-making but also enhances operational safety

Industrial-Strength Cross-Head Tip】Every drill bit within this set is equipped with a cross-head tip, which substantially augments its cutting power and precision. This meticulously engineered professional-grade design empowers the bit to slice through various materials with remarkable ease, yielding holes that are not only cleaner but also more accurate. When engaging in drilling operations on tougher surfaces like glass or ceramic, it is advisable to employ water cooling for the drill and meticulously control the rotational speed
description: Product Description Multiple Materials The drill bits exhibit remarkable adaptability and are suitable for an extensive array of materials. This encompasses glass, ceramics, tile, mirrors, flower pots, wood, porcelain, brick walls, marble, as well as thin metal sheets. When dealing with particularly hard substances such as ceramic tiles, concrete, masonry, marble, glass, and granite, it is recommended to use water to cool the drill bit. Additionally, a gradual application of pressure should be employed while initially maintaining a tilted angle that is then smoothly transitioned to vertical drilling. This approach not only ensures precision in hole-making but also enhances operational safety. High-Hardness Materials This carbide drill bit is specially designed for dry drilling of all-ceramic and other high-hardness materials. The unique four-edge serration design enables it to easily penetrate hard surfaces without overheating or damage. Whether you need to drill holes in tiles, glass or stone, these high-strength eccentric twist drill bit can provide efficient and accurate drilling results. High Quality Hex Shank Design:This enhanced versatility makes the set highly suitable for both professional contractors who demand precision in their work and DIY enthusiasts embarking on various home projects, as it ensures the appropriate tool is available for every task. The hex shank, in particular, plays a crucial role in enhancing holding power, effectively minimizing the potential for slippage during operation. Smooth Cutting: High-strength eccentric twist drill bit staggered edge design not only increases cutting speed, but also ensures the smoothness of the cutting surface. Even when drilling deep holes, these carbide drill bit can maintain stable performance without affecting work efficiency due to chip accumulation. Wear-Resistant And Sharp High-strength eccentric twist drill bitis made of carbide material, ensuring its excellent wear resistance and sharpness. Each carbide drill bit is precisely machined and heat-treated, so that it can maintain excellent performance after long-term use, and a pair of gloves are also included for your safe use. Quick Hole Opening High-strength eccentric twist drill bit adopts a standard hexagonal shank design, which is compatible with a variety of electric drills and impact drills. High-strength eccentric twist drill bit is not only easy to install and remove, but also provides better torque transmission, making the drilling process smoother and more efficient. Multiple Sizes How do l properly use this drill bit? Ensure the chuck is securely tightened on the power tool Use low speed and applylight pressure on the workpiece untilreaching the desired depth. Lubricate the cuttingedge with oilor a water-soluble ubricant to reduce friction, heat, and debris.
